highlights: Runs recurring automation jobs for monitoring, task generation, bookmarking, and system checks.
Persists job state and execution metadata to keep daily workflows deterministic.
Combines Python and TypeScript job pipelines for flexible automation coverage.
impact: Reduced manual operational overhead by turning repeatable AI/admin routines into scheduled, stateful automation.
one_liner: Automation hub for recurring AI operations, monitoring jobs, and task generation workflows.
problem: Manual execution of repetitive maintenance and monitoring tasks caused drift, inconsistency, and missed actions.
solution: Implemented a job orchestration setup with config-driven schedules, state tracking, and modular task sources.
title: SAI Automation Core
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
